_comment: Focus Board — the three active projects and one launch sequence. UI/data/docs only; Mission Control tracks state, it does NOT execute any of these actions. Honest labels: active | live | parked | blocked | manual | reported | not wired. Link objects may carry a 'pending' field naming the PR that must merge before the target exists on main.
title: Focus Board
subtitle: Three active projects. One launch sequence.
note: Tracked, not automated. Mission Control cannot deploy, set env vars, hit a database, or run Fly/Vercel from here — every "next safe action" and "owner action" below is a human/terminal step. Status words are colour-coded: green = active/live, amber = manual/parked, red = blocked.

projects.name: GrowVerse
projects.blocker: Backend/login path being resolved. The correct backend is the growpod Python API — frontiernext is NOT the login backend. A growverse-api Fly app shell exists; the database decision/path is in progress. Vercel BACKEND_URL must point at a healthy backend ONLY after a /health check passes.
projects.ownerAction: Bring growverse-api up from your authenticated machine (Fly diagnostic), confirm /health = 200, then wire Vercel BACKEND_URL.
nextSafeActions: Set Vercel BACKEND_URL (only to the healthy backend)
Then build Plant Intelligence / Grow Journal

projects.name: FRONTIER / Aether Wing
projects.blocker: Canonical scaffold/folder is not confirmed. No gameplay build starts until the real repo/folder is verified.
projects.ownerAction: Confirm the actual frontier-al repo/folder so the scaffold can be verified.
nextSafeActions: Verify the Vite / React / TS / Three.js scaffold
Only then build the playable dogfight slice

backlog.title: Season One / Aether Wing campaign design

projects.name: Devbiz / Control Plane
projects.blocker: /lab must stay protected on every public surface; the Agent Feed Inbox should be normalized; devbiz-memory should become the canonical brain only if confirmed.
projects.ownerAction: Verify /lab now 404s on Vercel (PR #30 merged), then configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/*.
nextSafeActions: Verify the Vercel public mirror now 404s /lab (PR #30 merged)
Verify the Cloudflare Access plan for /lab/*
Document devbiz-memory as the brain repo (needs confirmation)
Later: build the Stage 1 GitHub Agent Feed check
projects.note: These are Focus-Board working IDs for the control-plane sequence; they are distinct from the historical BUILD_LEDGER DBZ-### entries (DBZ-001 there = Games Studio launch). Reconcile numbering on a separate docs lane.

brain.label: external / candidate canonical agent brain
brain.note: Not directly available in this repo. Do not sync automatically yet — this is a candidate, recorded for visibility only.
